'''Arruna''' was a local resident of [[Najiba/Legends|Najiba]], and the lover of another Najiban, [[Lathaam]]. Lathaam had a big mouth, and when [[Adalric Cessius Brandl]] arrived on Najiba seeking passage to [[Trulalis]], Lathaam was the first to speak up. He told the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] that no [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was allowed offworld while the [[Children of Najiba]] were near the planet. Brandl replied by [[Telekinesis/Legends|strangling]] Arruna to death. Lathaam carried his dead love out of the bar, devastated.<ref name="The Final Exit" />
